1: import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
2: import { getAuthHeaders } from "./use-auth";
3: import { normalizeSearchText } from "@/lib/search-utils";
4: 
5: export type MenuItem = {
6:   id: number;
7:   name: string;
8:   price: number;
9:   categoryId: number | null;
10:   description: string | null;
11:   image: string | null;

15:   isPriority: boolean;
16:   isHidden: boolean;
17:   createdAt: Date | null;
18:   searchName?: string;
19: };
20: 
21: export function useMenuItems() {
22:   return useQuery<MenuItem[]>({
23:     queryKey: ["/api/products"],
24:     queryFn: async () => {
25:       const res = await fetch("/api/products", { credentials: "include", headers: getAuthHeaders() });
26:       if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch menu items");
27:       const data = await res.json();
28:       const items = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.value || []);
29:       return items.map((item: any) => ({
30:         ...item,
31:         searchName: normalizeSearchText(item.name),
32:       }));
33:     },
34:   });
35: }
36: 
37: export function useCreateMenuItem() {
38:   const queryClient = useQueryClient();
39:   
40:   return useMutation({
41:     mutationFn: async (data: { name: string; price: number; description?: string; image?: string | null }) => {
42:       const res = await fetch("/api/products", {
43:         method: "POST",
44:         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...getAuthHeaders() },
45:         body: JSON.stringify(data),
46:         credentials: "include",
47:       });
48:       
49:       if (!res.ok) {
50:         const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
51:         throw new Error(errorData.message || "Failed to create menu item");
52:       }
53:       
54:       return res.json();
55:     },
56:     onSuccess: () => {
57:       queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/products"] });
58:     },
59:   });
60: }
61: 
62: export function useUpdateMenuItem() {
63:   const queryClient = useQueryClient();
64:   
65:   return useMutation({
66:     mutationFn: async ({ id, ...data }: { id: number; name?: string; price?: number; description?: string; image?: string | null; isSticky?: boolean; isAvailable?: boolean; isPriority?: boolean; isHidden?: boolean }) => {
67:       const res = await fetch(`/api/products/${id}`, {
68:         method: "PATCH",
69:         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...getAuthHeaders() },
70:         body: JSON.stringify(data),
71:         credentials: "include",
72:       });
73:       
74:       if (!res.ok) {
75:         const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
76:         throw Object.assign(new Error(errorData.message || "Failed to update menu item"), { status: res.status });
77:       }
78:       
79:       return res.json();
80:     },
81:     onError: (error: any) => {
82:       if (error?.status === 401) {
83:         localStorage.removeItem("auth_token");
84:         localStorage.removeItem("auth_user");
85:         window.location.href = "/login";
86:       }
87:     },
88:     onSuccess: () => {
89:       queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/products"] });
90:     },
91:   });
92: }
